rules.label: 21.A.
rules.html: Each <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">player</dfn> is entitled to occupy any position on the field not occupied by an opposing player, unless specifically overridden elsewhere, provided that no personal contact is caused in taking such a position.
rules.text: Each player is entitled to occupy any position on the field not occupied by an opposing player, unless specifically overridden elsewhere, provided that no personal contact is caused in taking such a position.

rules.label: 21.B.
rules.html: A <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">player</dfn> who jumps is entitled to land at the take-off spot without hindrance by opponents. That player also is entitled to land at another spot, provided that the landing spot, and the direct path between the take-off and landing spots, were not already occupied at the time of take-off.
rules.text: A player who jumps is entitled to land at the take-off spot without hindrance by opponents. That player also is entitled to land at another spot, provided that the landing spot, and the direct path between the take-off and landing spots, were not already occupied at the time of take-off.
annotations: This does not trump a player’s responsibility to make reasonable efforts to avoid contact and to not commit a blocking foul. If you commit a blocking foul, the fact that you jumped to the spot instead of running does not negate the foul.

rules.label: 21.C.
rules.html: The defense must not move in a manner that obstructs the offense from taking <dfn data-rule="3.I">possession of the disc</dfn> or establishing a <dfn data-rule="3.H">pivot</dfn>.
rules.text: The defense must not move in a manner that obstructs the offense from taking possession of the disc or establishing a pivot.

rules.label: 21.D.
rules.html: Players may not use their extended arms or legs to obstruct the movement of an opponent.
rules.text: Players may not use their extended arms or legs to obstruct the movement of an opponent.
annotations: A player’s arms and legs are not considered “extended” during normal running and jumping.
